pi_items.source: Verified by task setup script and export result script.
Verified by task setup script (setup_task.sh) which explicitly generates this synthetic file.

Contradicted by JASP's source code (github.com/jasp-stats/jaspQualityControl). The actual internal identifier for Crossed Gauge R&R is 'msaGaugeRR', while 'qualityControlGaugeRrCrossed' does not exist in the JASP codebase.
Contradicted by JASP QML source (inst/qml/msaGaugeRR.qml). The exact internal option keys for long-format data variables are 'partLongFormat', 'operatorLongFormat', and 'measurementLongFormat'.
Contradicted by JASP QML source. The option to enable the variation components chart is internally called 'varianceComponentsGraph'.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires generating a Crossed Gauge R&R study in JASP using a synthetic dataset at /home/ga/Documents/JASP/MeasurementData.csv and saving it to /home/ga/Documents/JASP/GaugeStudy.jasp. While achievable in the JASP UI, the task metadata and programmatic verifier incorrectly hallucinate JASP's internal JSON keys. The actual JASP analysis type is 'msaGaugeRR' (not 'qualityControlGaugeRrCrossed'), the required variable mappings are 'partLongFormat', 'operatorLongFormat', and 'measurementLongFormat' (not 'part', 'operator', 'measurement'), and the chart option is 'varianceComponentsGraph' (not 'componentsChart'). Consequently, the programmatic verification checking the .jasp file contents will incorrectly fail a perfectly executed task.
